author: y4rr
content: Fixed in commit 92a19db3 as part of Sprint B.4 (#914). Same root cause as #856 (wrong parent rank). sub_backend_rank_mapping_matches_fixture now uses first-member backend as parent. to_global/to_local mapping verified: to_global(0)=1, to_global(1)=2, to_global(2)=3; to_local(1)=Some(0), to_local(0)=None. cascade_skip removed. Test passes.
